## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Example: Closes #123 -->

## Testing

<!-- List commands run, manual checks, or explain why tests were not run. -->

## API or Behavior Changes

<!-- Include request/response examples or migration notes when relevant. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused on one concern.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated, or this PR explains why they are not needed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior, setup, or APIs changed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, generated build output, or unrelated formatting changes are included.
